subcodes.first_line: In the name of the Beloved is He acclaimed, yet the One thus named is beheld in prison, at the hands of the heedless [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: باسم محبوب نامیده میشود ولکن مسمی در دست غافلین در سجن مشاهده میگردد گاهی در
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @development of capacity and readiness, @power of the Manifestation of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
